name: Nandita Roy
address: Salt Lake City Sector III, Kolkata, West Bengal - 700097

education.institution: IDC School of Design, IIT Bombay

institution: IDC School of Design, IIT Bombay

experience.title: Lead UX Designer
responsibilities: Led design for HealthPlix EMR (Electronic Medical Record) platform — primary tool for 50,000+ doctors across India.
Built and scaled the design team from 1 to 5 designers; established design rituals, critique processes, and hiring standards.
Redesigned prescription writing flow — reduced doctor's average prescription time from 4.2 min to 1.8 min (57% improvement). Validated by post-launch user research.
Designed HealthPlix Analytics dashboard for hospital administrators — data-heavy UX for 600+ KPI widgets, built on enterprise design system.
Embedded accessibility guidelines into design process — 100% WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for all new features from Q2 2023.
Conducted quarterly design sprints with 3 hospital networks as embedded researcher; synthesized 120+ hours of field research.

experience.title: UX Designer
responsibilities: Designed GST filing flow improvements for QuickBooks India, reducing support ticket volume by 31%.
Ran 3 unmoderated usability tests using UserTesting platform with 15 SME users per round.
Contributed 45 components to the QuickBooks India Design System (Figma).

design_tools: Figma (Expert — Variables, Branching, Dev Mode, Prototype)

skills_flat: Figma (Expert — Variables, Branching, Dev Mode, Prototype)

projects.name: HealthPlix Doctor Prescription Redesign
projects.description: Comprehensive UX research and redesign of EMR prescription module. Field research with 18 doctors across 3 cities. Full case study: discovery → IA → wireframes → tested prototypes → shipped → measured. 57% time reduction.

projects.name: NeuroViz – Neuro Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Personal project: Designed a complex neurological patient data dashboard for hospital neurologists. Solved for data density, cognitive load, and clinical accuracy. Featured on UX Collective Medium (8,200 reads).

projects.name: Enterprise Design System — HealthPlix
projects.description: Built from scratch: design token system (light/dark/high-contrast modes), 150+ components, documentation, contribution guidelines. Adopted by 5 squads.
